label: Flowchart
code:
graph TD
    A[Start] --> B{Condition}
    B -->|Yes| C[Process A]
    B -->|No| D[Process B]
    C --> E[End]
    D --> E

label: Class
Sequence
code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant U as User
    participant S as Server
    participant DB as Database
    U->>S: Request
    S->>DB: Query
    DB-->>S: Result
    S-->>U: Response

label: Entity Relationship
State
code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Idle
    Idle --> Processing : Start
    Processing --> Success : OK
    Processing --> Error : Fail
    Success --> [*]
    Error --> Idle : Retry
    state Processing {
        [*] --> Validating
        Validating --> Executing
        Executing --> [*]
    }

label: Mindmap
code:
mindmap
  root((Project))
    Planning
      Requirements
      Schedule
    Development
      Frontend
      Backend
      Database
    Testing
      Unit Test
      E2E Test

label: Architecture
code:
architecture-beta
    group api(cloud)[API]
    group client(cloud)[Client]

    service db(database)[Database] in api
    service server(server)[Server] in api
    service web(internet)[Web App] in client

    web:R --> L:server
    server:R --> L:db

label: Block
code:
block-beta
    columns 3
    Frontend blockArrowId6<[" "]>(right) Backend
    space:2 down<[" "]>(down)
    DB[("Database")]

label: C4
code:
C4Context
    title System Context
    Person(user, "User", "A user of the system")
    System(sys, "System", "The main system")
    System_Ext(ext, "External", "External service")
    Rel(user, sys, "Uses")
    Rel(sys, ext, "Calls")

label: Gantt
code:
gantt
    title Project Plan
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    section Design
    Requirements :a1, 2026-03-01, 7d
    UI Design    :a2, after a1, 5d
    section Development
    Implement    :b1, after a2, 10d
    Test         :b2, after b1, 5d

label: Git
code:
gitGraph
    commit
    commit
    branch develop
    checkout develop
    commit
    commit
    checkout main
    merge develop
    commit
    branch feature
    checkout feature
    commit
    checkout develop
    merge feature
    checkout main
    merge develop

label: Kanban
code:
kanban
    Todo
        id1["Task A"]
        id2["Task B"]
    In Progress
        id3["Task C"]
    Done
        id4["Task D"]

label: Packet
code:
packet-beta
    0-15: "Source Port"
    16-31: "Destination Port"
    32-63: "Sequence Number"
    64-95: "Acknowledgment Number"
    96-99: "Data Offset"
    100-105: "Reserved"
    106-111: "Flags"
    112-127: "Window Size"

label: Pie
code:
pie title Browser Share
    "Chrome" : 65
    "Safari" : 19
    "Firefox" : 4
    "Edge" : 4
    "Other" : 8

label: Quadrant
code:
quadrantChart
    title Priority Matrix
    x-axis Low Effort --> High Effort
    y-axis Low Impact --> High Impact
    quadrant-1 Do First
    quadrant-2 Schedule
    quadrant-3 Delegate
    quadrant-4 Eliminate
    Task A: [0.3, 0.8]
    Task B: [0.7, 0.9]
    Task C: [0.2, 0.3]
    Task D: [0.8, 0.2]

label: Radar
code:
radar-beta
    title Skills
    axis1 "Frontend"
    axis2 "Backend"
    axis3 "DevOps"
    axis4 "Design"
    axis5 "Testing"
    "Alice" : [4, 5, 3, 2, 4]
    "Bob" : [3, 3, 5, 4, 3]

label: Requirement
Sankey

sankey-beta

Source A,Target X,30
Source A,Target Y,20
Source B,Target X,15
Source B,Target Z,25
Target X,Final,45
Target Y,Final,20
Target Z,Final,25

label: Timeline

timeline

    2026-Q1 : Design
           : Prototyping
    2026-Q2 : Development
           : Alpha Release
    2026-Q3 : Testing
           : Beta Release
    2026-Q4 : Launch

label: User Journey
code:
journey
    title User Purchase Journey
    section Browse
      Visit site: 5: User
      Search product: 3: User
    section Purchase
      Add to cart: 4: User
      Checkout: 3: User, System
      Payment: 2: User, System
    section Post
      Receive order: 5: User

label: XY
code:
xychart-beta
    title "Sales Revenue"
    x-axis [Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun]
    y-axis "Revenue (k$)" 0 --> 120
    bar [50, 60, 75, 80, 95, 110]
    line [50, 60, 75, 80, 95, 110]
